title: Lesson: Ranges de RFI em cEV
plan: Read the PDF 'Reg Life - Ranges de RFI em cEV.pdf' to extract exact RFI ranges by position (UTG, MP, HJ, CO, BTN, SB) and standard sizing rules (2-2.5BB)

Enhance _eval_rfi() method in src/analyzers/lesson_classifier.py to evaluate RFI execution based on position appropriateness, sizing correctness (2-2.5BB), and basic hand strength if hero_cards available
Verify/update the RFI detection rule in classify_hand() if any edge cases are needed (e.g., SB open vs steal distinction)
Add comprehensive tests in tests/test_lesson_classifier.py for RFI evaluation: correct open from each position, wrong sizing, fold of strong hand in open spot, marginal cases
files_likely_affected: classes/Reg Life - Ranges de RFI em cEV.pdf
